name: safe_transit_right_keepout
description: PRZ_WAITINGAREA called from a position above the waiting line (Y=325, in service area) but outside the safe X corridor on the RIGHT (X=275, above safe_corridor_x_max=250). Exercises the round-1 _SAFE_SERVICE_TRANSIT corridor-clamp branch that slides X to safe_corridor_x_max before traversing to the waiting area.
